sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29695" key="duwkaieikosi/phxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠωκαιεικοσί-πηχυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n29695.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twenty-two cubits long</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:15:678" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.678</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
